name: codex-accounts
description: Native multi-account manager for Codex app, CLI, and IDE extension.

interface.shortDescription: Manage multiple Codex accounts with aliases and safe switching
interface.longDescription: Install a native Codex extension that manages multiple Codex sign-ins with aliases, safe switching, installer automation, and account health visibility without using a proxy.
defaultPrompt: List all Codex accounts that are currently registered and show which alias is active.
Switch the active Codex account to the alias I specify and explain the current account health.
